title: Prospective CSD Boundary Detection: Sequential Protocols Without Prior Knowledge of d*
summary: Demonstrates three sequential protocols for detecting LLM capability boundaries without prior knowledge of the critical difficulty d*. Uses per-level CSD indicator data (variance, dip statistic, silhouette, bimodality, disagreement rate) from 5 model-task pairs across arithmetic and graph coloring experiments. Protocol A (threshold-based), Protocol B (CUSUM/EWMA change-point detection), and Protocol C (d*-free LOPO classifier) are evaluated on F1, sensitivity, false alarm rate, deployment readiness score, and retention ratio vs. a prior d*-aware classifier (F1=0.949). The notebook loads 108 data points from mini_demo_data.json, runs all protocol variants, and produces comparison visualizations.
